## Summary

Explain what this changes and why.

## Source quality

- [ ] Primary source included
- [ ] Official source included where available
- [ ] Interpretations are attributed
- [ ] Uncertainty is labeled

## Privacy and safety

- [ ] No sensitive personal information
- [ ] No private messages or doxxing material
- [ ] No anonymity or safety guarantees
- [ ] No embedded third-party tracking content

## Validation

- [ ] `python scripts/validate_entries.py` passes
